reviews.review_description: I came to the game thinking I could use elements and fight others with it I went into a cutscene where I drifted around waited for 30 minutes just to start playing I never got to bend elements😭😭😭 (just letting you know this is entirely my fault not any of the devs)

I didn't think a $5 app could make me cry but this music AND scenery for especially the Earth, Fire and Air are SO unique and take me into a meditative space where I feel like I'm connecting with my ancestors (or heaven!) or something. PLEASE add more. I will buy! I know there's not more than 4 elements but perhaps more versions. This was truly magical!

developer_response.body: Many thanks for your kind words! We do have some similar experiences in the pipeline that we will share with you soon :)

reviews.review_description: If you wonder what is it as i did, it's just four animations of you flying slowly through four different environments, each one is rather short, like 2-3 minutes, with low resolution and nothing much happening.

developer_response.body: That's valuable feedback. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Please note that this app is designed to be more of a relaxing experience to calm the mind. Each film is between 5-7 minutes in duration. We are happy that it felt shorter when viewing.

reviews.review_description: I found it to be very beautiful and relaxing. Puts you in a good place feeling wonderful. I found it hard to select a favorite and they all have their wonderful quality's. the music is perfect as well. I highly recommend this mediative journey. Thank you for placing me in a good place with your creation.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words. We are happy to hear that you enjoyed this experience!
